author: lolipopshock
description: Manage research library and streamline research workflow.
name: Scholar

releases.author: lolipopshock
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feat: More api support by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/28
* Feat: Allow adding pdf to a paper + misc fixes by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/29
* Feat: Update readme by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/30


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/compare/1.4.0...1.5.0
releases.name: 1.5.0: More APIs, Add PDF, and Fixes

releases.author: lolipopshock
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feat: Add api skeleton by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/26
* Feat: [Add Ribbon Icon](https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/commit/3c74ae7ac4c4c763fbde67fcbc77e3bf11cca7f5)
* Fix: Add setting system path sep by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/27 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/compare/1.3.3...1.4.0
releases.name: 1.4.0: Scholar API & Fixes

releases.author: lolipopshock
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Allow setting s2 api in the app to avoid rate limits.  by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/23


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/compare/1.3.2...1.3.3
releases.name: 1.3.3: Patch Release

releases.author: lolipopshock
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix: Better pdf opening and add publication year to the default template  by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/12
* Fix: Add retry for downloading by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/22
* Fix: #17 



**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/compare/1.3.1...1.3.2
releases.name: 1.3.2: Patch Release

releases.author: lolipopshock
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix: Improvements based on plugin library listing auditing  by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/7
* Fix: Make sure the first searched paper can be included for downloading by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/8
* Feat: more configurable templates by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/9


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/compare/1.3.0...1.3.1
releases.name: 1.3.1: Patch Release

releases.author: lolipopshock
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feat: Add remove paper command by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/4
* Open PDF in system app by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/5


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/compare/1.2.1...1.3.0
releases.name: 1.3.0: Remove papers, and open pdf in default app

releases.author: lolipopshock
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix: Make sure pathSep is not undefined on iOS by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/3


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/compare/v1.2.0...v1.2.1

releases.author: lolipopshock
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add paper ops by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/2
    - **Check Reference** Obsidian Scholar allows you checking the details of the referred papers without leaving the tool
        ![03-search-paper.gif](https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/blob/main/.github/demo/03-check-paper-reference.gif) 
    - **Copy Paper BibTex**  
        ![04-copy-bibtex.gif](https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/blob/main/.github/demo/04-copy-bibtex.gif) 


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/compare/v1.1.0...v1.2.0

releases.author: lolipopshock
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add the paper search functionality by @lolipopshock in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/1

![02-search-paper.gif](https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/raw/main/.github/demo/02-search-paper.gif)

## New Contributors
* @lolipopshock made their first contribution in https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lolipopshock/obsidian-scholar/compare/1.0.0...v1.1.0
